---
title: "Prompt Format"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
date: "2025-12-22"
updated: "2025-12-22"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Prompt Format}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

## Why Prompts Are Written as Markdown Documents with YAML Headers

In this project, prompts are treated as **long-lived knowledge artifacts**, not disposable strings. Writing prompts as Markdown documents with YAML headers supports this goal by balancing clarity, durability, and future extensibility with minimal overhead.

### Why Markdown

- Encourages **clear, well-structured prompts** that separate roles, context, tasks, and constraints
- Improves **human readability**, review, and collaboration
- Integrates naturally with **Git-based workflows**, enabling meaningful diffs and version history
- Supports **disciplined iteration** over time, especially in academic and pedagogical settings
- Remains lightweight and tool-agnostic, avoiding lock-in to any specific platform or API

### Why YAML Headers

- Capture **stable, high-level metadata** about each prompt (purpose, audience, domain, status)
- Improve **organization and discoverability** without requiring tooling or automation
- Enable future capabilities such as filtering, indexing, logging, and semantic search
- Keep execution details and API-specific parameters **out of the prompt definition**
- Are **human-readable first**, remaining useful even if no parsing system is ever built

### Design Philosophy

- Prompts are treated as **maintainable assets**, not transient inputs
- Structure is used to **support thinking**, not constrain it
- Metadata is included only where it provides clear, lasting value
- The format should scale gracefully from **manual use today** to **API-driven workflows tomorrow**

Together, Markdown and YAML provide a simple, durable foundation for managing prompts as part of a larger, reproducible knowledge system while preserving flexibility as tools, models, and workflows evolve.

**Source:** https://chatgpt.com/g/g-p-694598b6f6448191945a46925123ae49-api/c/6949afd6-08a4-8331-b8d5-8fba80b7d028
